_comment_: Merge these into your existing package.json. Do NOT replace — you have many other deps.
function_only_dependencies_note: The three packages below are used ONLY inside netlify/functions/*.js. They are installed at the Netlify-function level. You have TWO options:
option_B_separate_functions_package: Create netlify/functions/package.json with the three deps above — cleaner isolation but Netlify must be told to install it. See README_DEPLOY.md.
